page_content:
DANC489 Special Topics in Dance (1-3 Credits)

Theoretical, choreographic, pedagogic, or performance study.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

DANC499 Practicum in Choreography, Production and Performance IV (1-6 Credits)

Advanced workshop in dance presentation, including performing, production and planned field experiences.
